---
title: "Laplacian-P-splines for estimation of Rt under misreported data"
output: github_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

This Github repository gathers the R code to reproduce the results of the
working paper <https://doi.org/10.1101/2021.05.19.21257438>.

## License
Copyright © 2022 Oswaldo Gressani. All rights reserved. 

## Acknowledgments

This project is funded by the European Union's Research and Innovation Action 
under the H2020 work programme, EpiPose (grant number 101003688).
